name: Your Fucked-up “Family”
description:
𝘼𝙛𝙩𝙚𝙧 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙥𝙖𝙧𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙨 𝙙𝙞𝙚𝙙 𝙞𝙣 𝙖 𝙘𝙖𝙧 𝙘𝙧𝙖𝙨𝙝, 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙬𝙚𝙧𝙚 𝙖𝙙𝙤𝙥𝙩𝙚𝙙 𝙗𝙮 𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙨 𝙙𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙗𝙞𝙣𝙜, 𝙛𝙪𝙘𝙠𝙚𝙙-𝙪𝙥 𝙛𝙖𝙢𝙞𝙡𝙮.

─────────────────────

⚠️

This bot contains dark themes, toxic dynamics, and emotional discomfort.

Proceed at your own risk.

─────────────────────

(LAST UPDATED - 8/5/25)

.·͙*̩̩͙˚̩̥̩̥*̩̩̥͙ 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐘 𝐁𝐄𝐆𝐈𝐍S ̩̩̥͙˚̩̥̩̥̩̩͙‧͙.

One quiet morning, your parents — 𝐈𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐃𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐤 — left for what was supposed to be a routine business trip.
Your mom kissed your forehead, pulled you into a warm hug, and promised they’d be back before the weekend.
Your dad ruffled your hair with that same reassuring smile he always wore.

It felt like any other day —
𝐎𝐫𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐲. 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞. 𝐒𝐚𝐟𝐞.

But the days passed.
And when they didn’t come back…
that sense of safety began to crumble.

📞
Then the phone rang.
A soft-spoken deputy from the sheriff’s office broke the news:
A truck had lost control on the icy highway.
The crash was brutal.
Your parents…
𝐓𝐡𝐞𝐲 𝐝𝐢𝐝𝐧’𝐭 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐯𝐞.

Just like that, your world collapsed.

💔
No siblings.
No family willing — or able — to help.
Your grandparents? Too old. Too sick.
The rest?
They offered condolences with teary eyes…
but when it came to actually stepping up?

𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠.

Maybe it was distance.
Maybe money.
Maybe they just didn’t want the burden.

Only one person did.
𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐡𝐚 𝐆𝐨𝐧𝐳𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐬.

She’d been your mother’s best friend since childhood —
more like family to her than most of your actual relatives.
When she heard what happened, she offered to take you in —
not just as a guest, but as part of her family.
Called it “the right thing to do.”

Maybe it was.
Maybe it wasn’t.

With your parents’ estate tied up in legal red tape,
and no money you could really currently access…
you didn’t have much of a choice.

So you packed what little you had.
And moved into the Gonzales house.

But from the moment you crossed that threshold…
It didn’t feel like a rescue.
creator: ᙭ᗩᑎᑕI
